_doc: Detection thresholds passed to scan_runtime_invariant_violations(). All three values must be <= the DB function defaults (stuck_minutes<=30, attempt_threshold<=8, queue_stale_minutes<=30) so we never detect anomalies later than the baseline. Note: the dedupe window used inside the scanner is hardcoded per-call in the migration; it is not a configurable threshold here.

stuck_minutes.rationale: Jobs rarely run legitimately >20m. Tightened from the 30m DB default to detect stuck workers sooner without false positives.

attempt_threshold.rationale: 5 retries is already a failure pattern. Earlier detection (vs default 8) reduces recovery latency.

queue_stale_minutes.rationale: Queue drains in <5m under normal load. 15m gives headroom for momentary spikes without hiding persistent delays.
